name: Pick-a-Dilly Melon, Hearts of Palm W/Chutney Vinaigrette
recipeIngredient: 14 ounces hearts of palm, canned, rinsed and drained
2 cups shredded lettuce or spinach - baby
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the hearts of palm into half circles.
2. Peel and slice honeydew melon and/or cantaloupe into thin pieces.
3. Toss the sliced melon with shredded lettuce or spinach leaves.
4. Add the hearts of palm to the salad mixture.
5. Drizzle with chutney vinaigrette.
6. Allow the salad to stand at room temperature for about 15 to 30 minutes before serving.
7. Serve with a sweet bread such as corn, squash, or pumpernickel.
(Note: Avoid serving sour dough Italian bread.)
